title: Droom Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Droom Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Droom Ventures Solutions family as a E-commerce Executive in Srinagar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Droom Ventures Solutions:
Droom Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Droom Ventures Solutions!
